texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1. RESERVATION STATUS
texts.text: 1. RESERVATION STATUS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations will be honoured with a voucher, an LPO or supporting  document  on  official  letterhead  bearing  the authorized signature advised to Rift Valley Hills Resort as set  out  in  the  Schedule  hereto. Save for manifest fraud, anything appearing to have been signed by the authorized signatory shall bind the Company. Any change of signatories should be notified to Rift Valley Hills Resort  and will take effect from the time it is received by Rift Valley Hills Resort. The exact taken up reservations by the Company along with the rooming list should be received  by Rift Valley Hills  Resort's  sales/  reservations  office  prior  to  arrival  of guests at Rift Valley Hills Resort.
texts.text: Reservations will be honoured with a voucher, an LPO or supporting  document  on  official  letterhead  bearing  the authorized signature advised to Rift Valley Hills Resort as set  out  in  the  Schedule  hereto. Save for manifest fraud, anything appearing to have been signed by the authorized signatory shall bind the Company. Any change of signatories should be notified to Rift Valley Hills Resort  and will take effect from the time it is received by Rift Valley Hills Resort. The exact taken up reservations by the Company along with the rooming list should be received  by Rift Valley Hills  Resort's  sales/  reservations  office  prior  to  arrival  of guests at Rift Valley Hills Resort.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2. RELEASE PERIOD AND CANCELLATION
texts.text: 2. RELEASE PERIOD AND CANCELLATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellations should be notified to Rift Valley Hills Resort sales/reservations  office  verbally  and  followed  by  written notice of cancellation. Cancellation will be effective on the working day on which Rift Valley Hills Resort receives the written notice. Any reservations received after 5.00pm will be  deemed  to  be  received  on  the  next  working  day. Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers are subject to Rift Valley Hills Resort prevailing  Cancellation  and  No  Show  Fees  which  are currently as follows:
texts.text: Cancellations should be notified to Rift Valley Hills Resort sales/reservations  office  verbally  and  followed  by  written notice of cancellation. Cancellation will be effective on the working day on which Rift Valley Hills Resort receives the written notice. Any reservations received after 5.00pm will be  deemed  to  be  received  on  the  next  working  day. Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers are subject to Rift Valley Hills Resort prevailing  Cancellation  and  No  Show  Fees  which  are currently as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 0 -7 days, 100% of entire stay
texts.text: 0 -7 days, 100% of entire stay

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 8 -14 days, 50% of entire stay
texts.text: 8 -14 days, 50% of entire stay

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 15 -35 days, 25% of entire stay
texts.text: 15 -35 days, 25% of entire stay

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No show: 100% of entire stay
texts.text: No show: 100% of entire stay

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The number of days refers to the number of clear days between the cancellation date and the anticipated date of arrival of the guest (excluding the cancellation date and the date of arrival).
texts.text: The number of days refers to the number of clear days between the cancellation date and the anticipated date of arrival of the guest (excluding the cancellation date and the date of arrival).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rift Valley Hills Resort may cancel reservations in any of the following events:
texts.text: Rift Valley Hills Resort may cancel reservations in any of the following events:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) If the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7 days of the due date; or
texts.text: (a) If the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7 days of the due date; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) If Rift Valley Hills Resort reasonably believes that the Company's financial situation is such that the Company will not be able to honour its obligations under this agreement; or
texts.text: (b) If Rift Valley Hills Resort reasonably believes that the Company's financial situation is such that the Company will not be able to honour its obligations under this agreement; or

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. DEPOSIT POLICY
texts.text: 3. DEPOSIT POLICY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Advance deposits where required Rift Valley Hills Resort are calculated on the total value of the booking and are payable as follows:
texts.text: Advance deposits where required Rift Valley Hills Resort are calculated on the total value of the booking and are payable as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 50% due if booking is made 8 -14 days prior to arrival
texts.text: 50% due if booking is made 8 -14 days prior to arrival

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 100% due if booking is made 0 hrs - 7 days prior to arrival
texts.text: 100% due if booking is made 0 hrs - 7 days prior to arrival

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event that the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7  days  of the  due  date  (where  bookings  are  made 8-14 days prior to arrival) or within 24 hours (where bookings are made 48hrs -7 days prior to arrival) (as the case may be), Rift Valley Hills  Resort  may  treat  the  reservation  as cancelled by the Company.
texts.text: In the event that the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7  days  of the  due  date  (where  bookings  are  made 8-14 days prior to arrival) or within 24 hours (where bookings are made 48hrs -7 days prior to arrival) (as the case may be), Rift Valley Hills  Resort  may  treat  the  reservation  as cancelled by the Company.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. RESERVATION GUARANTEES
texts.text: RESERVATION GUARANTEES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations  must  be  guaranteed  by  means  of  cash, cheque, credit card or inter-bank transfer in such amount as required by Rift Valley Hills Resort from time to time  and in any event not being less than the cost of one night's rate for the type of room reserved. Non-guaranteed reservations are subject to release by Rift Valley Hills Resort at 18:00hrs on the day of expected arrival.
texts.text: Reservations  must  be  guaranteed  by  means  of  cash, cheque, credit card or inter-bank transfer in such amount as required by Rift Valley Hills Resort from time to time  and in any event not being less than the cost of one night's rate for the type of room reserved. Non-guaranteed reservations are subject to release by Rift Valley Hills Resort at 18:00hrs on the day of expected arrival.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5. RATE CONFIDENTIALITY
texts.text: 5. RATE CONFIDENTIALITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  agreed  company  rates  are  only  valid  for  bona  fide associates of the Company and may not be revealed to, or used to book for, third parties other than in accordance with the provisions of this clause. The rates agreed here must not be displayed directly over the internet or on third party websites but may be packaged together with airfare and/or other arrangements so that the Rift Valley Hills Resort rates herein are not transparent.
texts.text: The  agreed  company  rates  are  only  valid  for  bona  fide associates of the Company and may not be revealed to, or used to book for, third parties other than in accordance with the provisions of this clause. The rates agreed here must not be displayed directly over the internet or on third party websites but may be packaged together with airfare and/or other arrangements so that the Rift Valley Hills Resort rates herein are not transparent.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6.  CHILDREN
texts.text: CHILDREN

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A child in a baby cot (up 4 years old) sharing a room with an adult can stay free of charge. Children under 13 years staying in a separate room will be charged at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate & 45% for a child sharing a room with adult/s.
texts.text: A child in a baby cot (up 4 years old) sharing a room with an adult can stay free of charge. Children under 13 years staying in a separate room will be charged at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate & 45% for a child sharing a room with adult/s.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 7. ARRIVAL AND CHECKOUT TIMES
texts.text: ARRIVAL AND CHECKOUT TIMES

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Initial
texts.text: Initial

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12.00hrs on the scheduled  arrival  date.  Check  out  time  on  the  day  of departure is 10.00hrs. Pre-booking is encouraged for early arrivals to guarantee rooms upon arrival and a pre- booking will be subject to a full overnight rate.
texts.text: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12.00hrs on the scheduled  arrival  date.  Check  out  time  on  the  day  of departure is 10.00hrs. Pre-booking is encouraged for early arrivals to guarantee rooms upon arrival and a pre- booking will be subject to a full overnight rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8.  DAY ROOM
texts.text: DAY ROOM

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Day room rate (subject to  room availability)  is  at  75%  of applicable  rates.  Check  out  time  for  day  room  use  is 18:00hrs.  Check-out  after  18:00hrs  is  subject  to  the  full room rate.
texts.text: Day room rate (subject to  room availability)  is  at  75%  of applicable  rates.  Check  out  time  for  day  room  use  is 18:00hrs.  Check-out  after  18:00hrs  is  subject  to  the  full room rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9.  COMPLIMENTARY ROOMS
texts.text: COMPLIMENTARY ROOMS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort  will  subject  to  the  availability  of rooms  grant  matching  complimentary  rooms/  guests  as follows
texts.text: Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort  will  subject  to  the  availability  of rooms  grant  matching  complimentary  rooms/  guests  as follows

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Each 15 paying guests in a group the 16 th person is free to a maximum of 2 single rooms.
texts.text: Each 15 paying guests in a group the 16 th person is free to a maximum of 2 single rooms.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 10. GOVERNMENT TAXES
texts.text: GOVERNMENT TAXES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rift Valley Hills Resort rates include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event that the Government of Kenya adjusts the prevailing or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right to adjust the rates contained in this agreement accordingly.
texts.text: Rift Valley Hills Resort rates include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event that the Government of Kenya adjusts the prevailing or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right to adjust the rates contained in this agreement accordingly.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 11. PAYMENTS
texts.text: PAYMENTS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unless the Company has credit facilities with Rift Valley Hills Resort, the Company is required, subject to clause 3 above, to make full payment prior to arrival, failure to which Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled. We currently accept the following credit cards: Visa, Master Card, American Express and Diners International. Cheque payments will be accepted only if cleared in advance of arrival. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest arrival, Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right to request cash payment before a guest can check-in. The bank details are as follows:
texts.text: Unless the Company has credit facilities with Rift Valley Hills Resort, the Company is required, subject to clause 3 above, to make full payment prior to arrival, failure to which Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled. We currently accept the following credit cards: Visa, Master Card, American Express and Diners International. Cheque payments will be accepted only if cleared in advance of arrival. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest arrival, Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right to request cash payment before a guest can check-in. The bank details are as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 12. CREDIT FACILITIES
texts.text: CREDIT FACILITIES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Credit  facilities  may  be  extended  to  the  Company  upon meeting  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort  requirements  for  such facilities.  Where  such  facilities  have  been  extended,  the Company  will,  subject  to  the  credit  approval  terms,  be permitted  make  reservations  with  a  voucher,  an  LPO  or letter of commitment bearing the authorized signature, received  prior to  any  arrival. Subject to  Rift  Valley  Hills Resort prevailing credit policy from time to time, invoices shall be raised in the nominated currency, weekly, monthly or at the end of guest stay at Rift Valley Hills Resort. On any account where details of payment have not been specified, payment  terms  will  be  applied  in  accordance with  this agreement terms.
texts.text: Credit  facilities  may  be  extended  to  the  Company  upon meeting  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort  requirements  for  such facilities.  Where  such  facilities  have  been  extended,  the Company  will,  subject  to  the  credit  approval  terms,  be permitted  make  reservations  with  a  voucher,  an  LPO  or letter of commitment bearing the authorized signature, received  prior to  any  arrival. Subject to  Rift  Valley  Hills Resort prevailing credit policy from time to time, invoices shall be raised in the nominated currency, weekly, monthly or at the end of guest stay at Rift Valley Hills Resort. On any account where details of payment have not been specified, payment  terms  will  be  applied  in  accordance with  this agreement terms.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 13. EXCHANGE RATE
texts.text: EXCHANGE RATE

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Foreign currency exchange will be at Rift Valley  Hills Resort prevailing rate at the time of guest stay
texts.text: Foreign currency exchange will be at Rift Valley  Hills Resort prevailing rate at the time of guest stay

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 14. DISPUTES
texts.text: DISPUTES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Rift Valley Hills Resort finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Company will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and  the  Company  notified  of  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted  on  the  invoice  and  payment  will  be  due  within seven  (7)  days  of  the  adjusted  invoice. It  is  expressly agreed  and  declared  that  any  disputes,  action  or  other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Rift Valley Hills Resort finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Company will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and  the  Company  notified  of  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted  on  the  invoice  and  payment  will  be  due  within seven  (7)  days  of  the  adjusted  invoice. It  is  expressly agreed  and  declared  that  any  disputes,  action  or  other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 15. DEFAULT
texts.text: DEFAULT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Without prejudice to any other rights available to Rift  Valley Hills Resort, in the event of default in payment of undisputed invoices  and  resolved  invoices,  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort reserves the right to refuse the Company's clients admission into and use of Rift Valley Hills Resort facilities until payment  is  made  in  full. Rates  quoted  in  this agreement are subject to the Company not defaulting as against the agreed schedule of making payments.  Where delays  in  payment  by  the  Company  occur,  the  terms  of Contract  are  in  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort  sole  discretion subject to change and may lead to
texts.text: Without prejudice to any other rights available to Rift  Valley Hills Resort, in the event of default in payment of undisputed invoices  and  resolved  invoices,  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort reserves the right to refuse the Company's clients admission into and use of Rift Valley Hills Resort facilities until payment  is  made  in  full. Rates  quoted  in  this agreement are subject to the Company not defaulting as against the agreed schedule of making payments.  Where delays  in  payment  by  the  Company  occur,  the  terms  of Contract  are  in  Rift  Valley  Hills  Resort  sole  discretion subject to change and may lead to

texts.label: text
texts.orig: withdrawal  of  credit  terms  previously  extended  to  the Company.
texts.text: withdrawal  of  credit  terms  previously  extended  to  the Company.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 16. CONSISTENT DEFAULT
texts.text: CONSISTENT DEFAULT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Consistent default shall constitute cause for termination of this agreement. The Company shall be considered to be in a  condition  of  CONSISTENT  DEFAULT  where  invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.
texts.text: Consistent default shall constitute cause for termination of this agreement. The Company shall be considered to be in a  condition  of  CONSISTENT  DEFAULT  where  invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 17.  COLLECTION FEES
texts.text: COLLECTION FEES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Company agrees to pay any and all fees, court costs and other expenses incurred by Rift Valley Hills Resort in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques.
texts.text: The Company agrees to pay any and all fees, court costs and other expenses incurred by Rift Valley Hills Resort in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 18. SUSPENSION OF OBLIGATIONS
texts.text: SUSPENSION OF OBLIGATIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rift Valley Hills Resort shall not be held responsible in the event,  and  to  the  extent,  that  the  performance  of  this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence. In such circumstances Rift Valley Hills  Resort shall be relieved  of  its  obligations  under  this agreement.
texts.text: Rift Valley Hills Resort shall not be held responsible in the event,  and  to  the  extent,  that  the  performance  of  this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence. In such circumstances Rift Valley Hills  Resort shall be relieved  of  its  obligations  under  this agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 19. CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT
texts.text: CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right at any time, by giving  notice  in  writing,  to cancel  this  Agreement  should the Company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon  such  cancellation  all  sums  outstanding  from  the Company shall be immediately due and payable.
texts.text: Rift Valley Hills Resort reserves the right at any time, by giving  notice  in  writing,  to cancel  this  Agreement  should the Company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon  such  cancellation  all  sums  outstanding  from  the Company shall be immediately due and payable.
